title: Analysis of Microbial Volatile Compounds by SPME-GC/MS
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"v8gf","text":"This protocol describes the use of headspace solid-phase microextraction (SPME) and GC-MS to identify volatile organic compounds (VOCs) produced by ‘Candidatus Pseudomonas auctus’ JDE115 under different culture conditions. VOCs are adsorbed on a 50/30 µm DVB/CAR/PDMS StableFlex® fiber, thermally desorbed in a GC injector, and analyzed on a DB-5 column with an Agilent 7890 GC–5975C MSD system. Compounds are identified by comparison to Wiley and NIST spectral libraries. The assay confirms bacterial production of 1-undecene and dimethyl disulfide (DMDS), both implicated in antifungal activity ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":148,"length":12},{"style":"italic","offset":178,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"d3v9o","text":"Use freshly prepared PDA medium in airtight vials.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fikc5","text":"Pre-condition SPME fibers according to manufacturer’s instructions.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4qj7j","text":"Run all samples, blanks, and controls under identical instrument conditions for reproducibility.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1kl6m","text":"Include both bacterial and fungal controls, plus medium-only blanks.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"3f2ff","text":"Pre-clean and bake glass vials to remove contaminants.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d35du","text":"Verify incubator temperature at 28 °C.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bcg36","text":"Prepare labeled 20 mL airtight vials with Teflon septa.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7fvfv","text":"Confirm GC-MS system calibration and mass library availability.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"bna9f","text":"Handle all cultures in a biosafety cabinet when possible.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"69tn1","text":"Volatile metabolites may include hazardous compounds; avoid direct inhalation.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ekk6","text":"GC-MS solvents and carrier gases must be handled in accordance with institutional chemical safety rules.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2uk8a","text":"Follow manufacturer instructions for safe handling of SPME fibers.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Culture conditions: JDE115 (bacterial control) A. rolfsii (fungal control) JDE115 + A. rolfsii (co-culture) Medium-only (blank control) Inoculate 10 mL PDA into 20 mL airtight vials, incubate at 28 °C.

Prepare airtight 20 mL vials with 10 mL PDA. Inoculate according to the four experimental conditions. Incubate at 28 °C until VOC production stage. Equilibrate samples at room temperature for 30 min. Insert pre-conditioned SPME fiber into vial headspace for 10 min exposure. Retract fiber and immediately inject into GC injector port.

Injector port: 200 °C Split ratio: 1:10 Purge flow: 3 mL/min Carrier gas: Helium, 1.0 mL/min constant flow Oven program: Initial 35 °C, hold 3 mins Ramp 15 °C/min to 200 °C Hold 200 °C for 5 min Transfer line: 220 °C Mass spectra: Electron ionization (EI) mode Library: Wiley and NIST
Collect chromatograms and spectra for each sample. Identify peaks by comparison to library spectra. Quantify target compounds by peak integration (e.g., DMDS, 1-undecene).
creator: Md Sahadat Ali
